corpus: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation annual reports
creator: EQX BATCH
licenseOrTerms: Public domain / U.S. government work

metadata.Author: FDIC – Division of Finance/Jannie Eaddy
metadata.Creator: EQX BATCH
metadata.Keywords: Annual Report, Performance and Accountability Report, Performance Results, Audited Financial Statements, Risk Management, Internal Controls, Deposit Insurance, Supervision, Consumer Protection, Bank Resolution, Complex Financial Institution.
metadata.Subject: The Annual Report provides a comprehensive overview of the Corporation’s programs and performance for the calendar year and includes the audited financial statements of the Deposit Insurance Fund (DIF) and the FSLIC Resolution Fund (FRF); provides an assessment of the reliability of the Corporation’s performance data; and states whether there is reasonable assurance that the objectives of Section 2 and Section 4 of the Federal Managers’ Financial Integrity Act have been achieved.
metadata.Title: FDIC 2024 Annual Report

rationale: first page selected from a real financial report document to exercise pdfplumber page geometry, objects, text, words, colors, images, annotations, and table summaries when present.
source: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation annual reports
title: FDIC 2024 Annual Report
